title: SOA-Harness v1.1 `soa-validate` release-gate Report
description: Normative schema for the JSON document emitted at `--out <path>` by `soa-validate` (default path `release-gate.json`). Adopter tooling (CI gates, dashboards, badge generators) can validate against this schema rather than reading undocumented fields. Shape is backwards-compatible across v1.1.x — fields can be added (additionalProperties: true by design) but never removed or re-typed.

tool.description: Literal identifier. Allows multi-tool release-gate aggregators to key by tool.

version.description: soa-validate CLI version string. Typically matches a Git tag on the validate repo.

profile.description: Conformance profile under which the run was executed.

impl_url.description: Base URL of the implementation Runner that was probed. Empty string when the run was vector-only.

live_path_enabled.description: True when SOA_IMPL_URL / --impl-url reached a responding Runner and live probes executed. False = vector-only run.

declared_adapter_mode.description: §18.5.5 --adapter flag value (langgraph | crewai | autogen | langchain-agents | custom). Empty string = native Runner mode.

memory_backend.description: §8.7 --memory-backend flag value (mock | sqlite | mem0 | zep | custom). Labels the run; does not change test selection.

id.description: Test ID (e.g. SV-BUD-01, HR-12, SV-LLM-07, SV-ADAPTER-02).

section.description: Spec section (§X.Y) or descriptor the test anchors against.

path.description: Which surface produced this evidence. Vector path checks static artifacts; live path exercises a running Runner.
